summary: Tested Dynamic Page Builder standardization with 15 page types. All backend APIs (seed, policy-report, auto-fix, resolve) working correctly. Frontend Admin Content Builder UI loads with all 15 page types selectable, seed button functional. SearchPage and WizardContainer runtime mappings verified.

issues: Console hydration warnings for span inside select/option (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: Hydration warnings present in console for select/option elements - minor React SSR issue, not blocking functionality
seed_data_creation: 15 standard page types seeded via API for DE/global/individual/A
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 134 tested the new Dynamic Page Builder 15 standard page types feature. Backend endpoints verified: seed-defaults (200 + 15 items), policy-report (PASS for wizard_preview), auto-fix (working), resolve with layout_preview=draft (working). Frontend: Admin Content Builder loads with 18 page type options (15 standard + 3 legacy), seed button works and shows success message. SearchPage/WizardContainer runtime page type mappings verified working (category_l0_l1, search_ln, wizard_step_l0, wizard_step_ln, wizard_step_form, wizard_preview).

backend_seed_endpoint.details: Returns 200 with 15 page types, creates/updates draft revisions, proper validation for invalid persona/variant

backend_policy_report.details: Returns listing_create policy for wizard_preview, all checks pass

backend_resolve_draft_preview.details: Returns draft revisions for all 15 page types

frontend_admin_content_builder.details: 18 page type options visible, seed button works, preset packs available

frontend_search_page_runtime.details: category_l0_l1 and search_ln resolve calls work

frontend_wizard_container_runtime.details: wizard_step_l0, wizard_step_ln, wizard_step_form, wizard_preview resolve calls work
